final_prompt: Use case: stylized-concept; Asset type: combat background for Orbwalker; Primary request: production candidate dungeon combat background for a fantasy match-3 roguelike. Scene/backdrop: deep stone dungeon arena with elemental carvings, distant archway, subtle enemy-stage depth, no active characters. Subject: environment only, designed to sit behind board, enemy panel, and HUD. Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game background, clean painterly fantasy. Composition/framing: vertical mobile-friendly background with a darker low-detail central zone for combat UI and board readability. Lighting/mood: tense adventure, cool blue stone shadows, small warm torch accents. Color palette: charcoal stone, blue-violet shadows, small gold/orange fire highlights, restrained effects. Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no characters, no UI frame, no casino imagery, no gore, avoid high-detail clutter in the center.
